message:
test(core): add unit tests for cgr-compare and metagenomic-niche

Add comprehensive test suites for two analysis modules:

cgr-compare.test.ts (23 tests):
- Identical CGR comparisons (zero distance, perfect similarity)
- Different CGR comparisons (non-zero distances)
- Resolution mismatch error handling
- Empty grid handling
- Scaling invariance tests
- Metric symmetry and range validation
- Realistic similarity scenarios

metagenomic-niche.test.ts (35 tests):
- Abundance normalization with pseudocounts
- CLR transformation properties
- Basis correlation estimation (SparCC-like)
- NMF decomposition with convergence
- Co-occurrence network construction
- Complete niche analysis pipeline
- Demo data generation with seeded RNG
- Edge cases (single taxon/sample, zero counts)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
